notes: Creates an app instance with use(), get(), post(), put(), delete(), patch(), options(), head(), all(), onError(), listen(), and handler.
Parses JSON bodies into req.body. Options: limit, strict (true), reviver, type ('application/json').
Parses URL-encoded bodies. Options: extended (false), limit, type ('application/x-www-form-urlencoded').
Reads plain text into req.body. Options: type ('text/*'), limit, encoding ('utf8').
Reads raw bytes into a Buffer on req.body. Options: type ('application/octet-stream'), limit.
Streams file parts to disk; sets req.body to { fields, files }. Options: dir (os.tmpdir()/zero-http-uploads), maxFileSize.
Serves static files with 60+ MIME types. Options: index ('index.html'), maxAge (0), dotfiles ('ignore'), extensions, setHeaders.
CORS middleware with preflight handling. Options: origin ('*'), methods, allowedHeaders, credentials (false).

Node HTTP/HTTPS client. Response has ok, status, statusText, headers.get(), text(), json(), arrayBuffer(). Options: method, headers, body (auto-serialized), timeout, signal, agent, onDownloadProgress, onUploadProgress.
Per-IP rate limiter. Sets X-RateLimit-* headers. Options: windowMs (60000), max (100), statusCode (429), message, keyGenerator.
Request logger with response timing. Options: format ('dev'|'short'|'tiny'), logger (console.log), colors (auto TTY).
